$comment: D-CSUBSET-PACKED: a struct member __attribute__((packed)) removes all inter-field padding end-to-end (frontend -> interner packed flag -> computeLayout). A MISALIGNED multi-byte field (v@1, w@5) is read+written at RUNTIME — the empirical proof codegen needs no packed fork (arm64 LDUR/STUR, x86 mov). exit = sizeof(P)9 + offsetof(P,v)1 + offsetof(P,w)5 + 27 = 42; padded would give 12+4+8+27=51. Data-model-independent, so the one exit code holds on all four targets incl. the shipped release pipeline.
